# Hyve Dynamics

> Hyve Dynamics builds conformable, high-density sensing arrays that deliver real-time pressure, temperature and strain data. Our Haptic Matrix platform transforms aerospace, automotive, energy and robotics industries with intelligent surface monitoring.

## Company Overview

Hyve Dynamics is a UK-based deeptech company developing the "nervous system for machines." Our core technology — the Haptic Matrix — is an ultra-thin (0.33mm), flexible sensor array that conforms to any surface and captures high-density measurement data in real time.

Proven in Tier 1 aerospace wind tunnel testing, the platform is built for any industry where surface behaviour matters.

## Core Technology: Haptic Matrix

- Ultra-thin conformable sensor arrays (0.33mm)
- Multi-modal: pressure, temperature, and strain sensing
- 100+ sensing nodes per array
- Real-time high-frequency data acquisition
- Non-invasive deployment in under 1 hour
- Reusable and repositionable without damage

## Industries Served

- **Aerospace**: Wind tunnel instrumentation, CFD validation, flight test, structural health monitoring
- **Automotive & Motorsport**: Aerodynamic development, downforce mapping, EV efficiency, thermal management
- **Digital Twinning & IHM**: Live digital twin correlation, condition-based maintenance, anomaly detection
- **Robotics**: Tactile sensing, environmental awareness, adaptive control, process monitoring
- **Energy**: Wind turbine monitoring, infrastructure health assessment
- **Structural Health**: Composite monitoring, fatigue detection, impact event indication
